article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.1. Attachment 1 - Draft Community Grant Policy Revised 2026.03.10.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to consider updated Community Grant Policy for non-profits
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a revised Community Grant Policy that would set the rules for how non-profit organizations apply for City funding. The proposed policy would cover operating grants, initiative grants, recreational sports grants, and food security grants — with clear eligibility rules, dollar limits, and reporting requirements.
briefs.action_required: If your non-profit relies on City grants, review the proposed policy now to check if your organization still qualifies.
